extract: Iron Hands redirects here. For the Ability with a similar name, see Iron Fist (Ability). Iron Hands (Japanese: テツノカイナ Tetsunokaina) is a dual-type Fighting/Electric Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Iron Hands is said to be either a future relative of Hariyama or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
